$description: Component tokens for Mobile Header component with platform-specific variants (iOS/Android), multiple type variants (Default, Default Left, Compact Large, Large Title), optional leading icons, and optional tabs. Supports flexible layouts with title, subtitle, avatar, and action groups. Figma Reference: Node ID 55-32232

$component.name: Header
$component.description: A mobile header component that provides navigation and context at the top of mobile screens. Supports platform-specific designs (iOS and Android), multiple type variants for different use cases, optional leading icons for navigation, optional tabs for secondary navigation, and flexible content including titles, subtitles, avatars, and action groups.
$component.structure: Container with background, shadow, and padding. Contains leading section (optional icon + avatar), center section (title with optional icon + subtitle with optional tags), trailing section (action group). Optional tabs section below main header. Layout adapts based on type variant (horizontal for Default/Default Left, vertical for Large Title).

sizes.default: 70px height (iOS) / 70px height (Android) - Standard header without tabs
sizes.with-tabs: 106px height (iOS) / 112px height (Android) - Header with tabs below
sizes.large-title: 118px height (iOS/Android) - Large title variant without tabs
sizes.large-title-with-tabs: 174px height (iOS/Android) - Large title variant with tabs

platform.ios: iOS platform design with iOS-specific styling and spacing
platform.android: Android platform design with Android-specific styling and spacing

type.default: Standard header with horizontal layout, 16px title (iOS) / 20px title (Android)
type.compact-large: Compact large variant with adjusted spacing
type.large-title: Large title variant with 36px title (iOS) / vertical layout, prominent title display

leading-icon.none: No leading icon, avatar starts at left edge
leading-icon.present: Leading icon (back/chevron) before avatar with 8px gap

tabs.present: Tabs section below header, increases header height

usage.contexts: Mobile app screens, navigation headers, detail pages, list headers, profile headers, settings screens
usage.features: Platform-specific designs, Multiple type variants, Optional leading navigation icons, Optional tabs for secondary navigation, Flexible content (title, subtitle, avatar, tags), Action groups for header actions, Shadow elevation

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile header - background, padding, shadow, and layout

default.description: Mobile header default shadow - elevation shadow for header separation
Mobile header gap between main sections (leading, center, trailing) - auto

large-title.description: Mobile header gap between main sections (leading, center, trailing) - 8px

leading.$comment: Leading section tokens - optional back icon and avatar/leading icon

color.description: Mobile header back/leading icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

default.description: Mobile header avatar/leading icon default size - 20px

large-title.description: Mobile header avatar/leading icon size for large title variant - 56px

radius.description: Mobile header avatar/leading icon border radius - fully rounded/circular

title.$comment: Title section tokens - typography varies by platform and type variant

default.description: Mobile header iOS default title typography - 16px semibold, 24px line height

large-title.description: Mobile header iOS large title typography - 36px semibold, 44px line height, -0.72px letter spacing

default.description: Mobile header Android default title typography - 20px semibold, 30px line height

large-title.description: Mobile header Android large title typography - 36px semibold, 44px line height

default.description: Mobile header title default color - neutral/gray-900 - #101828
Mobile header title icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

gap.description: Mobile header gap between title text and icon - 4px

subtitle.$comment: Subtitle section tokens - text and optional tags

typography.description: Mobile header subtitle typography - 12px regular, 17px line height

default.description: Mobile header subtitle default color - neutral/gray-500 - #667085

gap.description: Mobile header gap between subtitle elements (tags and text) - 4px

height.$comment: Height tokens for mobile header across different variants

with-tabs.description: Mobile header iOS height with tabs - 112px

large-title.description: Mobile header iOS large title height - 118px

large-title-with-tabs.description: Mobile header iOS large title height with tabs - 174px
